patch:
@@ -58,7 +58,9 @@ param(
     [ValidateRange(0, 5)]
     [int]$MaxCorrectionRounds = 2,
 
-    [switch]$TraceTiming
+    [switch]$TraceTiming,
+
+    [switch]$EnablePreflightAudit
 )
 
 $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'
@@ -1254,10 +1256,12 @@ try {
     $ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'
     $global:LASTEXITCODE = 0
     try {
-        & powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File $loopScript `
-            -DispatchId $id -GoalFile $goalFile `
-            -MaxPlanRevisions $MaxPlanRevisions -MaxCorrectionRounds $MaxCorrectionRounds `
-            2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath $loopLog
+        $loopArgs = @('-NoProfile', '-ExecutionPolicy', 'Bypass', '-File', $loopScript,
+            '-DispatchId', $id, '-GoalFile', $goalFile,
+            '-MaxPlanRevisions', $MaxPlanRevisions,
+            '-MaxCorrectionRounds', $MaxCorrectionRounds)
+        if ($EnablePreflightAudit) { $loopArgs += '-EnablePreflightAudit' }
+        & powershell.exe @loopArgs 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath $loopLog
     } finally {
         $ErrorActionPreference = $prevEap
     }

+orchestrator-protocol note, no `_REVIEW_` or `_CLOSEOUT_` packet is expected

+

+- `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1`:

+    (after `[switch]$TraceTiming`).

+    `if ($PublishMode -eq 'branch') { $queueArgs += '-NoPublish' }` and
+    `if ($TraceTiming) { $queueArgs += '-TraceTiming' }` lines), added a
+    third conditional append:
+    `if ($EnablePreflightAudit) { $queueArgs += '-EnablePreflightAudit' }`.
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1`:
+  - Added `[switch]$EnablePreflightAudit` to the `param(...)` block
+    (after `[switch]$TraceTiming`).
+  - Converted the existing `& powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy
+    Bypass -File $loopScript ... 2>&1 | Tee-Object` invocation to a splatted
+    `$loopArgs` array carrying the identical existing parameters
+    (`-DispatchId $id`, `-GoalFile $goalFile`, `-MaxPlanRevisions
+    $MaxPlanRevisions`, `-MaxCorrectionRounds $MaxCorrectionRounds`), then
+    appended `-EnablePreflightAudit` only when `$EnablePreflightAudit` is
+    set, and invoked `& powershell.exe @loopArgs 2>&1 | Tee-Object
+    -FilePath $loopLog`. Surrounding `$ErrorActionPreference`,
+    `$global:LASTEXITCODE`, `try/finally`, `Tee-Object` capture, and
+    exit-code handling are unchanged.
+
+### Tests
+
+- None added or edited. The TASK packet's "MUST NOT add new files" list
+  includes tests; this dispatch is a parameter passthrough only.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None edited. The TASK packet's "MUST NOT edit" list includes docs/templates/
+  schemas; the existing `.PARAMETER TraceTiming` doc blocks and surrounding
+  comments are intentionally untouched.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1`: two narrow additions — a new param and a
+  one-line conditional append next to the existing `-TraceTiming` append.
+  No other behavior changed.
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1`: one new param plus a refactor of the Loop
+  invocation from positional-with-backticks to a splatted args array so the
+  new switch can be conditionally appended. Semantically equivalent to the
+  prior invocation when `-EnablePreflightAudit` is unset.
+

+

@@ -0,0 +1,249 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-204
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-26_08-54-58+0300
+REVISION: 0
+RELATED_FILES:
+- Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1
+- Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1
+- Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_TASK_2026-05-26_08-54-58+0300.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_TASK_2026-05-26_08-54-58+0300.meta.json
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_EXEC_*.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_EXEC_*.meta.json
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_CORRECT_*.md
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_CORRECT_*.meta.json
+- ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md
+- GitHub issue #204
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Wire the already-implemented opt-in `-EnablePreflightAudit` switch from the
+autonomous driver through the queue runner into `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`.
+ISSUE-200 confirmed that the Loop switch exists but is currently unreachable
+from Auto-driven dispatches because neither Auto nor Queue accepts or forwards
+the switch. This dispatch adds only the narrow passthrough while preserving
+default behavior when the switch is omitted.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1`
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`
+- `Get-AiDispatchTrends.ps1`
+- `Get-AiDispatchHealth.ps1`
+- `Register-AiDispatchSchedule.ps1`
+- `Wait-GitHubActions.ps1`
+- `Watch-AiDispatch.ps1`
+- `new-handoff.ps1`
+- `.ai/**`, including `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1`, schemas, trace JSONL
+  artifacts, task brief files, and dispatch automation scratch logic
+- `ai_handoffs/**`, except this dispatch's own generated `ISSUE-204_TASK`,
+  `ISSUE-204_EXEC`, and `ISSUE-204_CORRECT` packets and matching `.meta.json`
+  sidecars
+- `ai_dispatch_logs/**`, except this dispatch's exact queue log artifact if
+  the queue runner creates one
+- The queue scope guard parser, positive-token parser, artifact-path checks,
+  retry behavior, recovery behavior, failure taxonomy, publish behavior, or
+  dashboard/trend/health behavior
+- Handoff packet templates, parser schemas, output schemas, docs, scheduler
+  scripts, workflows, Rust source, tests, fixtures, Cargo manifests,
+  `Cargo.lock`, status files, task brief files, `.gitignore`, and repository
+  metadata
+
+### MAY add new files
+
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_TASK_*.md`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_TASK_*.meta.json`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_EXEC_*.md`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_EXEC_*.meta.json`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_CORRECT_*.md`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-204_CORRECT_*.meta.json`
+- `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*.md`
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+
+- New source files, tests, fixtures, generated assets, manifests, lockfiles,
+  dependency files, crates, workflows, schemas, scripts, docs, ADRs, plans,
+  status files, architecture-lint artifacts, `.gitignore` entries, repository
+  metadata, dashboards, task brief files, packet templates, or scheduler files.
+- Handoff packets or sidecars for any dispatch other than ISSUE-204.
+- `REVIEW` or `CLOSEOUT` packets for this orchestrator dispatch.
+- Any `ai_dispatch_logs/**` file other than this dispatch's exact queue log
+  artifact if the queue runner creates one.
+
+## Deliverables
+
+- Add `[switch]$EnablePreflightAudit` to `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1`.
+- When Auto is invoked with `-EnablePreflightAudit`, append
+  `-EnablePreflightAudit` to the `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` child-process
+  arguments.
+- Add `[switch]$EnablePreflightAudit` to `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1`.
+- When Queue is invoked with `-EnablePreflightAudit`, pass
+  `-EnablePreflightAudit` to `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`.
+- Keep the passthrough strictly opt-in. When the switch is omitted from Auto or
+  Queue, no preflight audit is requested and the generated child-process
+  argument lists remain otherwise equivalent to current behavior.
+- Preserve existing `-TraceTiming` behavior: Auto still passes `-TraceTiming`
+  to Queue only when set, Queue timing trace behavior remains unchanged, and
+  the trace JSONL schema is not edited.
+- Leave `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1` untouched. It already owns the
+  `EnablePreflightAudit` implementation.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1` has a new optional switch parameter named
+  `EnablePreflightAudit` with no default-on behavior.
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1` forwards `-EnablePreflightAudit` to Queue only
+  when `$EnablePreflightAudit` is set. There is no environment-variable
+  fallback and no unconditional argument.
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` has a new optional switch parameter named
+  `EnablePreflightAudit` with no default-on behavior.
+- `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` forwards `-EnablePreflightAudit` to Loop only
+  when `$EnablePreflightAudit` is set. There is no environment-variable
+  fallback and no unconditional argument.
+- Default unset behavior is preserved: Auto and Queue invocations that omit
+  `-EnablePreflightAudit` do not request any preflight audit from Loop.
+- Existing `-TraceTiming` passthrough and timing trace output behavior are
+  preserved. The trace JSONL schema and timing event shape are not changed.
+- The implementation does not add a scheduler flag, default-on mode, retry
+  route, recovery route, dashboard, docs update, schema update, template
+  update, task brief update, or publish behavior change.
+- The only tracked source changes are in `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1` and
+  `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1`; other changes are limited to this dispatch's
+  own permitted handoff artifacts and exact queue log artifact.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- Do not edit `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`; the Loop-side
+  `EnablePreflightAudit` feature is already implemented.
+- Do not change how the Loop performs the preflight audit, writes
+  `codex.preflight.md`, validates the audit, injects prompts, verifies work,
+  or performs Codex control.
+- Do not change queue scope guard parsing or enforcement. This task is only a
+  parameter passthrough.
+- Do not change retry classification, recovery classification, blocked-run
+  behavior, publish gating, GitHub issue labels, branch naming, queue locks, or

+- Do not add environment-based activation for preflight audit. In particular,
+  do not add an `RGE_*` environment variable or reuse the TraceTiming
+  environment fallback pattern for this switch.
+- Do not add a scheduler option or re-enable the scheduler.
+- Do not update docs, templates, schemas, task brief files, workflows, Rust,

+- Do not run a nested dispatch as verification unless a human explicitly asks.

+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their
+`EXECUTION_REPORT`:

+- PowerShell parser validation for `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1` and

+```powershell
+$files = @(

+foreach ($file in $files) {

+}
+```

+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt without committing and request fresh guidance if any of
+the following occur:
+
+- The passthrough cannot be implemented by editing only
+  `Invoke-AiDispatchAuto.ps1` and `Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1` plus this

+- Any implementation path requires editing `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`.
+- Any implementation path requires changing scope guard parser logic, schemas,

+- Default unset behavior would change, or Auto/Queue would request preflight
+  audit without an explicit `-EnablePreflightAudit` switch.
+- The change would add default-on behavior, an environment fallback, a
+  scheduler flag, a new retry route, a new recovery route, or a dashboard.
+- Existing `-TraceTiming` passthrough behavior or timing trace JSONL shape
+  would change.

+- Static inspection cannot prove that `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1` is untouched.
+- Any edit outside the allowed file/artifact set appears. Do not clean or

+## Planner Notes
+
+ISSUE-200's audit found the current activation gap: `EnablePreflightAudit`
+exists in `Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1`, but Auto and Queue do not expose it.
+The smallest safe follow-up is therefore the two-hop switch passthrough only.

+`Tee-Object` loop log capture, exit-code handling, and all existing parameters.

+MUST add an opt-in EnablePreflightAudit switch to Auto and Queue

+MUST preserve default unset behavior with no preflight audit requested
+MUST NOT edit Invoke-AiDispatchLoop.ps1 scope guard parser schemas templates docs scheduler Rust Cargo workflows task brief retry recovery taxonomy publish or trace JSONL schema
+MUST preserve existing TraceTiming passthrough behavior
+MUST NOT add default-on behavior environment fallback scheduler flag new retry route recovery route or dashboard
+MUST run PowerShell parser validation for Auto and Queue, git diff --check, canonical .ai/dispatch.verify.ps1, and static inspection proving Loop is untouched
+```
